daily.today_energy: Your emotional intuition is basically at full volume right now. Trust those gut feelings—they're picking up on something real. Channel that sensitivity into creative outlets instead of spiraling.
daily.love: Someone's noticing your softer side today, and honestly? It's magnetic. Whether you're coupled up or single, vulnerability is your superpower. Let people see you without the protective shell.
daily.career: Your ideas hit different when you lead with authenticity instead of playing it safe. That project you've been hesitant about? The energy supports moving forward. Your instincts know the way.
daily.health: Your body's asking for grounding right now—think walks, tea, anything that feels nourishing. Mental calm follows when you slow down. Listen to what you actually need instead of what you think you should do.

weekly.overview: This week's energy invites you to lean into your intuition, Cancer. Something's shifting beneath the surface—trust those gut feelings. You're being called to release what no longer resonates and make space for something fresher. The vibe? Necessary closure leading to new beginnings.
weekly.love: Your emotional bandwidth is asking for authentic conversations right now. If you're coupled up, vulnerability opens doors. Single? Someone interesting might mirror your energy soon. Either way, stop dimming yourself down. Real connection happens when you show up as you actually are.
weekly.career: Ideas are flowing but execution matters more than perfection this week. You've got permission to start before you feel completely ready. Small moves in the right direction count. Your momentum builds through action, not endless planning. Trust the process and yourself.
weekly.health: Your body's asking for gentler rhythms this week. Listen when you need rest—it's not laziness, it's wisdom. Moving your energy through whatever brings you joy (dancing, walking, stretching) matters more than intensity right now. Hydration and consistent sleep hit different.
